Onset timestamps for the audio segment are:
```css
0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:00:0000-00:0
